title.en: MANUFACTURE BY DRY PROCESSES OF ARTICLES, WITH OR WITHOUT ORGANIC BINDING AGENTS, MADE FROM PARTICLES OR FIBRES CONSISTING OF WOOD OR OTHER LIGNOCELLULOSIC OR LIKE ORGANIC MATERIAL (containing cementitious material B28B; shaping of substances in a plastic state B29C; fibreboards made from fibrous suspensions D21J; drying F26B17/00)
{for increasing resistance to swelling by humidity}
Mixing the material with binding agent (mixing in general B01F)
Manufacture of substantially flat articles, e.g. boards, from particles or fibres
{characterised by the type of binder (compositions of macromolecular compounds C08L)}
{and at least partly composed of recycled material}
Making particle boards or fibreboards, with preformed covering layers, the particles or fibres being compressed with the layers to a board in one single pressing operation
Moulding or pressing (presses in general B30B)
After-treatment, e.g. reducing swelling or shrinkage, surfacing; Protecting the edges of boards against access of humidity
{Coating boards, e.g. with a finishing or decorating layer}
